memoryArtifacts.headline: Ambrose Fowler and Jane Alvord History follows:
memoryArtifacts.description:
AMBROSE FOWLER was born about 1618, of Dalbury, Lees, Derbyshire, England, to William Fowler (1572-1660) and Sarah Neeld (1599-1638.) He married Jane Alvord, 26 May 1646, in Windsor, Massachusetts.

A …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Joan Hawkins於1594年4月出生在英國薩默塞特阿希爾時，她的父親John Hawkins II22歲，母親Mary Elinor Levett12歲。她於1618年5月11日與Thomas Alford在英國薩默塞特阿希爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1636年5月27日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年42歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frances Joan Hawkins于1594年4月出生在英国薩默塞特阿希爾时，她的父亲John Hawkins II22岁，母亲Mary Elinor Levett12岁。她于1618年5月11日与Thomas Alford在英国薩默塞特阿希爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1636年5月27日在英国英格兰薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年42岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hawkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hawkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name, with excrescent -s, from Hawkinge (Kent). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Heafoc or Old English heafoc ‘hawk’ + the placename forming suffix -ing. This name has been assimilated to the patronymic surname in Devon from Sir John Hawkyns (1532–95), victor against the Spanish Armada (1588), who was a member of the Devon family of Hawkins, a branch of a Kentish family from the village of Hawkinge. They held land in Plymouth as long ago as 1480.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Joan Hawkins was born in April 1594, in Ashill, Somerset, England, her father, John Hawkins II, was 22 and her mother, Mary Elinor Levett, was 12. She married Thomas Alford on 11 May 1618, in Ashill, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 27 May 1636, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Joan Hawkins est née en avril 1594, à Ashill, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Hawkins II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Elinor Levett, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Alford le 11 mai 1618, à Ashill, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 27 mai 1636, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frances Joan Hawkins im April 1594 in Ashill, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hawkins II 22 und ihre Mutter Mary Elinor Levett 12. Sie hat am 11. Mai 1618 in Ashill, Somerset, England Thomas Alford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. Mai 1636 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Joan Hawkins è nata il nel aprile 1594 nel Ashill, Somerset, England, sua padre, John Hawkins II, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mary Elinor Levett, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Alford il 11 maggio 1618, nel Ashill, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 maggio 1636, nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Whitestaunton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Joan Hawkinsが1594年4月にイギリスソメルセトアシュイルで生まれた時，父John Hawkins IIは22歳，母Mary Elinor Levettは12歳であった。1618年5月11日にイギリスソメルセトアシュイルでThomas Alfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1636年5月27日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンで42歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Joan Hawkins(이)가 1594년 4월 영국 서머세트 애시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hawkins II(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Elinor Levett(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1618년 5월 11일 영국 서머세트 애시에서 Thomas Alford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1636년 5월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Joan Hawkins nasceu em abril de 1594, em Ashill, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hawkins II, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elinor Levett, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Alford em 11 de maio de 1618, em Ashill, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 27 de maio de 1636, em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Joan Hawkins родилась апрель 1594 г. в местности ашилл, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Hawkins II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Elinor Levett, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Alford 11 мая 1618 г. в местности ашилл, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 мая 1636 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frances Joan Hawkins nació en abril de 1594, en Ashill, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hawkins II, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Elinor Levett, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Thomas Alford el 11 de mayo de 1618, en Ashill, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1636, en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
